archimate:DataObject.name: JRC Data Catalogue
archimate:DataObject.documentation:
Description: The Joint Research Center (JRC) Data Catalogue is a collection of metadata records that provides information about datasets produced by the Joint Research Centre (JRC) in accordance with its Data Policy. The JRC, as the European Commission's in-house science service, conducts research to provide independent scientific advice and support to the policies of the European Union.
Publisher: Joint Research Center (JRC)
Source: https://data.jrc.ec.europa.eu/
LOST view: SV-Metadata Catalogue
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/JRCDataCatalogueDataObject
EIRA concept: eira:SolutionBuildingBlock
Last modification: 2024-01-28
Identifier: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/egovera/JRCDataCatalogueDataObject
Interoperability Layer: Semantic
Realises: http://data.europa.eu/dr8/MetadataCatalogueDataObject

properties.value: The Joint Research Center (JRC) Data Catalogue is a collection of metadata records that provides information about datasets produced by the Joint Research Centre (JRC) in accordance with its Data Policy. The JRC, as the European Commission's in-house science service, conducts research to provide independent scientific advice and support to the policies of the European Union.
